feat: 更新终端组件和引用内容为中文

更新终端组件中的路径显示和提示符样式，将默认英文内容替换为中文。替换所有引用内容为《诡秘之主》中的经典台词，并添加自定义分析脚本用于跟踪页面访问。

commit.message:
feat: 添加多存储支持(R2/S3/Telegram)和评论回复功能

实现多存储提供商支持，包括R2、S3兼容存储(缤纷云)和Telegram通道
新增StorageManager统一管理不同存储提供商
添加评论回复功能，支持嵌套评论结构
扩展数据库schema支持图片元数据存储和评论父子关系
增加管理API端点用于评论审核和统计分析
更新README文档说明多存储配置和使用方法

commit.message: Update github-data.json
Update github-data.json
Update github-data.json
Update github-data.json
Update github-data.json

feat: 更新终端组件和引用内容为中文

更新终端组件中的路径显示和提示符样式，将默认英文内容替换为中文。替换所有引用内容为《诡秘之主》中的经典台词，并添加自定义分析脚本用于跟踪页面访问。
Update github-data.json

feat: 添加多存储支持(R2/S3/Telegram)和评论回复功能

实现多存储提供商支持，包括R2、S3兼容存储(缤纷云)和Telegram通道
新增StorageManager统一管理不同存储提供商
添加评论回复功能，支持嵌套评论结构
扩展数据库schema支持图片元数据存储和评论父子关系
增加管理API端点用于评论审核和统计分析
更新README文档说明多存储配置和使用方法

refactor: 重构项目配置和用户界面元素

feat: 添加管理员后台功能用于评论管理
fix: 更新API基础URL和认证令牌键名
style: 修改终端卡片显示用户名
docs: 更新关于页面和个人信息
build: 添加部署脚本和marked依赖
Update github-data.json
Update github-data.json
chore: release v0.11.3

feat: 添加Atom和JSON订阅源生成，并重构订阅源构建逻辑
feat: Add Atom and JSON feed generation and refactor feed building logic

feat: 站点地图新增友链页面，并更新robots.txt禁止规则
feat: Add friend links page to sitemap and update robots.txt disallow rules

refactor: 更新友链和赞助商数据源URL

将友链和赞助商数据源URL从原域名迁移到jsDelivr CDN，提高资源加载速度和可靠性
chore: 更新网站统计脚本的URL和ID配置

feat(ArtitalkView): 添加Fancybox支持并增强Markdown渲染

添加@fancyapps/ui依赖用于图片画廊功能
实现自定义Markdown渲染器支持Fancybox图片预览
完善Markdown内容的样式显示
chore: release v0.11.2

fix: 公开文章发布日期比较时仅比较日期部分，以避免时区问题并确保当天发布文章可见
fix: Compare only the date part for public post `publishedAt` to avoid timezone issues and ensure same-day posts
Update github-data.json
Update github-data.json

feat(样式): 添加默认光标样式并配置MCPorter

添加默认光标样式文件并更新index.css以使用该样式
新增mcporter.json配置文件用于MCP服务配置

fix(上传): 扩展支持的文件类型并修正上传处理逻辑

fix: 更新API基础地址为新的域名

Polish UI, theme toggle, add remark alert

Refine UI and interactivity across the site and add a minimal markdown alert fallback plugin.

- Header: introduce a compact toolbar group (GitHub, theme, auth), restyle avatar, dropdown and controls, add global toolbar CSS, and support desktop/mobile theme toggle buttons.
- Theme toggle: support multiple toggle elements, keep aria state and rotate icon on change.
- Pagination / Tag badges / PostCard: update spacing, rounded corners, shadows and hover interactions for a more cohesive card/button system; move tag badges into responsive positions.
- TOC: dispatch a toc:sync-active event when opening the drawer and add a listener to sync active TOC item; add visibility checks when scrolling and ensure TOC is wired into BlogPost layout.
- BlogPost: include TocDrawer in the layout, add helper isElementVisible, improve code-expander by tracking data-expanded attribute.
- Content: correct author/mention names in CN/EN blog posts.
- Markdown config: add a small remark plugin fallback to parse GitHub-style blockquote alerts and enable shiki syntax highlighting; add dependency "remark-github-blockquote-alert" in package.json (lockfile added).
deploy
first commit

Improve TOC, code blocks, and images (webp)

Replace various site images/avatars with WebP sources for smaller payloads; update home wallpaper and about/profile images to .webp. Enhance TOC behavior: add data attributes for drawer/sidebar, ensure scroll unlocking on navigation/pagehide, normalize decoded IDs, map links from both sidebar and drawer, and use IntersectionObserver (with scroll fallback) to set active TOC links and keep them visible. Make drawer/drawer-link behavior defensive (unlock scroll before navigation) and normalize initial state on page swaps. Add code block enhancements: copy button, language label, collapse/expand for long blocks, and accompanying CSS styles. Add an avatar URL for a friend link and add locale tags to the CN/EN blog posts. Misc: minor layout tweaks to BlogPost TOC structure and adjustments to global CSS overflow rules.

Attach user dropdown early; add content metadata

Always attach the user dropdown click handler immediately (before the async user fetch) and remove the duplicate listener added later to ensure the dropdown is responsive even if user fetch is delayed or fails.

Extend the content collection schema with optional metadata fields (lang, group, author, category, slug, draft, and typora-root-url) to support bilingual posts, grouping translations, author/category organization, draft flags, and Typora image path compatibility. Update two blog posts to set a shared group and clean up redundant frontmatter (removed category/slug/draft and adjusted tags) so translations are linked by group.
chore: release v0.11.0

Add Cloudflare domain registration guides (EN/CN)

Add two new blog posts (English and Chinese) providing a step-by-step guide to registering a Cloudflare domain. Covers reasons to choose Cloudflare, payment preparation (Visa/ICBC example), TLD recommendations, purchase flow, DNS/CNAME setup and proxy settings, includes screenshots and frontmatter metadata (author Dan, pubDate 2026-03-08).

fix(github-storage): 修复base64解码中文UTF-8编码问题并完善用户信息处理

改进base64Decode函数以正确处理UTF-8编码的中文，将解码过程分为两步：先解码为二进制字符串，再转换为UTF-8。同时为createPostInGitHub添加完整的用户信息处理逻辑。

refactor(github-storage): 优化文件名生成和markdown生成逻辑

优化generateSafeFilename函数，移除特殊字符并限制文件名长度
重构postToMarkdown函数，使用字符串拼接替代模板字符串

fix(github-storage): 确保base64编码结果不包含换行符

修改base64Encode函数，移除结果中的所有换行符，保证返回单行base64字符串

fix(github-storage): 修复 base64 编码函数处理 UTF-8 字符的问题

使用 Uint8Array 和 btoa 的组合确保正确处理 UTF-8 字符，并优化自定义编码实现

refactor(github-storage): 优化 GitHub API 请求日志和错误处理

fix(github-storage): 确保 posts 目录存在

添加对 posts 目录的检查逻辑，在确保仓库存在的同时验证 posts 目录是否存在，若不存在则自动创建。这解决了当仓库已存在但 posts 目录缺失时导致的功能异常问题。

fix(存储): 重构 GitHub 存储错误处理逻辑

修改 createPostInGitHub 直接抛出错误而非返回 false，并更新调用方适配此变更
移除冗余的错误检查代码，简化错误处理流程

fix(github-storage): 改进GitHub存储错误处理和日志记录

检查并验证必要的环境变量配置
增强API请求的日志记录以帮助调试
